# Training Session Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize training-session reference discovery, payload-read policy, parser ownership, and neutral reconstruction boundaries before KMP migration. They focus on deterministic PFTP directory traversal, file-type classification, file-size aggregation, the current Android/iOS exercise path shape difference, the current missing exercise-file platform policy, payload fetch ordering, progress math, malformed component isolation, unknown advanced sample-list handling, neutral session-summary scalar reconstruction fields carried beside decoded payload bytes, and the protobuf/gzip parser families that must become executable in common code. `TrainingSessionCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes the shared reference-discovery, unknown-file ignoring, aggregate-size, path-shape, missing-file decision, payload fetch-order, final progress, malformed payload omission, known-sample preservation, neutral summary scalar reconstruction fields, `payload-parser-policy.json` parser-ownership coverage, and `training-session-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for directory traversal, summary discovery, exercise classification, unknown-file ignoring, aggregate size, exercise path policy, missing exercise-file policy, payload fetch order, progress calculation, malformed component isolation, unknown advanced sample-list ignoring, known sample preservation, parser-family ownership, byte-level parser dependency gates, platform training-session vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate`, while generated public protobuf model construction remains platform-owned and rollback for this parser-family slice is to ignore neutral fields/bridge columns and parse public models from decoded payload bytes in the adapters.
